title: Ribesiodes viridiflorum
taxonomy: Ribesiodes viridiflorum is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is commonly known as the green-flowering gooseberry. As a member of the Rosaceae family, Ribesiodes viridiflorum is closely related to other plants such as roses and apples. The family Rosaceae is a large and diverse group that includes over 2,000 species of plants. The classification of Ribesiodes viridiflorum places it within the kingdom Plantae.
